name: Area Quest Inc.
summary: Area Quest Inc. provides real estate solutions in Japan. It operates through Tenant Invitation, Update and Contract Management, and Building Management divisions. The company attracts tenants on behalf of building owners and managers; and provides advice and information for solving the problems related to building management, as well as meets the sales needs of building owners. It also provides building management and subleasing services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
